chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 146 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.706/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 31.01.2024 Mr. Faheem Majeed Memon, Advocate for respondents No.1 and 2..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Sarfraz A. Akhund, learned Counsel for petitioners, under latter’s instructions, does not press this petition with permission to file a fresh petition, as the petitioner has been retired meanwhile. Accordingly, the petition, in above terms, is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
